title: STOP Chasing Supply & Demand Zones - Do THIS Instead
description: Most traders waste time marking every supply and demand zone. Here's what actually works in ICT trading. The truth will surprise you.
script: MYTH: Mark every supply and demand zone. More zones equal better trades. Wrong approach completely. You're creating analysis paralysis. Too much noise. TRUTH: Focus on premium and discount arrays only. Quality over quantity wins. This filters out 90% noise. Better entries guaranteed. Follow R2F Trading for more.
